parameters.name: vdd
parameters.override_behavior: sets the high level of all four clock outputs

parameters.name: tr
parameters.override_behavior: sets rise and fall smoothing for all clock outputs

modeling_constraints: AMS role: deterministic four-phase clock stimulus source for sampled-data timing.
Drive every clock output relative to the declared vss reference port.
Preserve the phase relationship without relying on external stimulus.
Do not add undeclared control inputs, ports, or validation-only state.

properties.observable_contract: Each output repeats with a 20 ns period.
Each output has approximately 50 percent duty cycle.
Relative to clk0, corresponding rising edges of clk90, clk180, and clk270 lag by 5 ns, 10 ns, and 15 ns respectively.
The output phase ordering and offsets remain stable across repeated periods.
All clocks use 0 V and vdd levels with finite transition smoothing set by tr.

title: Multiphase Clock Generator 4ph
